label: About
title: About Clouded Earth Radio Garden
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 21 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around to be expected, by PINKCOURTESYPHONE and I Want An Earth, by Pinchy & Friends, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Clouded Earth Radio Garden: Create a ground-level synthetic listening garden, not a room: a wide field of winter soil, moss, fogged glass, and matte album-cover plates under a dusty pink translucent wash. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central dusty pink translucent slab, upper-right floating soil island, and left cloudy glass pane with waveform scratches.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
